; Toroloom — PgBouncer User List
;
; When auth_type = trust in pgbouncer.ini, this file is informational
; and not checked.  When auth_type = md5 or scram-sha-256, populate
; with SCRAM/SHA-256 hashed passwords generated by:
;   PGBOUNCER_AUTH_TYPE=scram-sha-256 psql -c "SELECT pg_shadow.usename, pg_shadow.passwd FROM pg_shadow;" template1
;
; Format:
;   "username" "hashed_password_or_SCRAM_string"
;
"toroloom" ""
